values.name: Conceptual
values.use_when: the dependent chapter relies on concepts established elsewhere.

values.name: Evidential
values.use_when: the dependent chapter relies on evidence developed elsewhere.

values.name: Methodological
values.use_when: the dependency is via procedural or interpretive method.

values.name: Structural
values.use_when: the dependency is due to sequencing or architectural placement.
